title: Past simple: form and use
explanation:
Past simple (A2)

Use the past simple for finished actions at a specific time in the past.

Regular: verb + -ed. Irregular: second column (go → went).

Time words: yesterday, last week, in 2019, ago.

questions.text: She [*didn't go|not go|doesn't go] to the party.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I ____ my wallet on the bus. | *lost | lose | losing
She ____ a letter to her friend. | *wrote | write | written
We ____ late for the meeting. | *arrived | arrive | arriving
He ____ TV all evening. | *watched | watch | watches

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option to complete the sentences.

questions.text: I [*bought|buy|buyed] a new phone last month.
They [*didn't see|don't see|weren't see] the email.
[*When did|When do|When were] you start learning English?
She [*left|leave|leaving] early because she was tired.
We [*had|have|has] a great time on holiday.
